dairy-free-trout-dip.name: Dairy-free Trout Dip

ingredients.prep: dark green and white parts separated, very thinly sliced

instructions: Purée almonds, oil, ½ tsp. salt, and ½ cup water in a high-powered blender on high speed until thick and smooth, about 3 minutes. Transfer almond purée to a medium bowl.

Using a fork, smash trout into smaller pieces and mix with scallion whites, lemon zest, 1 tsp. lemon juice, and a big pinch of pepper. Taste and adjust salt and lemon juice accordingly. Transfer to a serving bowl, then top with scallion greens and more pepper.
Do Ahead: Dip can be made 2 day ahead. Cover and chill.

dark-chocolate-gronala-parfait-lezzet.name: Dark Chocolate Gronala Parfait
instructions: 1. Lightly rub yogurts into a bowl.
2. Share a tablespoon of food to serve bowls.
3. Add fruits as well as in a way to be a bit.
4. Add some granola on fruits.
5. Complete the process respectively until all materials are finished.
6. Decorate and serve with a cut-off and fruit in a row.

death-by-chocolate.name: Death By Chocolate
instructions: Bake cake according to package directions for one 9x13 inch cake. When cake is cool poke holes in the top and pour the coffee liqueur over it. Break up the cake into 1 inch cubes and set aside.
Mix the pudding mixes with the milk until thick.

In a large punch bowl layer 1/2 of the cake cubes, 1/2 of the pudding, 1/2 of the crushed candy bars, and 1/2 of the whipped topping. Repeat layers following the same order. Sprinkle top toasted almonds and any additional crushed butter toffee candy bars, if desired. Cover and refrigerate for several hours before serving.

instructions: We'll start our recipe, organize all the ingredients to get them at hand.
Then you'll have your chocolate tablet and you'll snap it.
You're going to melt chocolate with a pisser's bath next to butter and Sugar. Then you'll put his cream in. Meg and let merge.
Once the chocolate's been melting by the cream, it goes out and gets cold.
Take your mix to the refrigerator for 1 hour so that it's compact very well.
After that time, you put your hazelnuts onto a plate.
Take out your mix and you'll start making uniform balls.
Later you will pass them through the plate with hazelnuts to bounce them.
Let compact for another 20 minutes and ready.
Enjoy them!

delicious-jacket-potatoes-stuffed-argiro.name: Delicious Jacket Potatoes (stuffed)

ingredients.item: 1 cup of mixed grated cheeses that melt
1 cup of mixed grated cheeses that melt

instructions: Wash the potatoes very well, rubbing the skin to clean Thoroughly, and sip them.
Stick them everywhere with a fork and rub them with some olive oil. We roll them into think salt so it sticks to the skin.
Place the potatoes on the grill and make them in a strong, preheated evening at 2003
Cut a think slide from the two ages to stand on the plate.
Cut each potato along and pour the flush into a bowl. Purify it by fork or wire.
Add salt and pepper, half grated cheese and butter, stirring until it melts into the hot potato.
Add the yolk, cream cheese and some cream, starring until it becomes a smooth, homogenized filling.
Transfer the mixture into a cornet with a kick star nose.
Add some yogurt or cream cheese and finely chopped ham. Fill the cases with the cornet, leaving the filling to swell above the surface.
Place the stuffed potatoes on a baking pan, sprinkle with a little melted butter and baking for 10 minutes at 200°C.
Sprinkle the remaining grated cheese and put it back in the oven for a few minutes until it melts.
Finish with some chives and serve hot ones.

dilly-bean-potato-salad.name: Dilly Bean Potato Salad

ingredients.prep: halved lengthwise, very thinly sliced (about 1 cup)
purslane, or wild arugula, coarsely chopped

ingredients.item: Coarsely chopped fresh flat-leaf parsley or celery leaves

instructions: Place shallots in a small bowl. Stir in 6 tablespoons red wine vinegar and a large pinch of salt; set aside.
Cook potatoes in a large saucepan of boiling salted water until just tender, about 30 minutes.
Drain potatoes well; transfer to a large bowl.
Lightly crush potatoes with the back of a large spoon.
Add the shallot-vinegar mixture to the hot potatoes and toss to incorporate. Season with salt and pepper.
Whisk 1 cup mayonnaise and smoked paprika in a small bowl; add to the potatoes and toss to combine.
Fold in watercress, Dilly Beans, and eggs. Season to taste with salt, pepper, and more vinegar, if desired.
Garnish with parsley.
This salad can be made 1 day ahead. Cover and chill. Return to room temperature before serving, if desired, stirring in additional mayonnaise if dry.

donuts-in-the-oven-argiro.name: Donuts In The Oven

ingredients.item: A little extra flower for the making
A little extra flower for the making

instructions: Add the lukewarm milk, sugar, melted butter, vanilla, yeast and whisk well.
Add the beaten eggs and mix with the wire.
A little bit, add the flower and mix with a spoon.
When the dough starts to gather in a ball, knead with floured hand until the bowl is complete cleared.
If it sticks too much to the hands, sprinkle some flower and remove the duck on our counter.
On a lightly flowered surface, knead the dough very well for 5′ by pulling it and opening it.
The more we work the dough the more fluffy the stuffed doughnuts will come in the evening.
The dough at the end must be malleable, soft and very fluffy.
Collect all the dough from below and touch it in oiled bowls.
Cover the dough very well airtight and let it double according to the temperature of the space around 1 hour and 15′ with 1 hour and 30′.
Empty the fluffy dough on the counter and ferment it well to deflate.
We don't use any flower. If a little sticky on the hand, oil the fingerers slightly.
Create in a think long dough role.
With a sharp knife cut in 12 equal places.
Gentle press each piece of dough on our palm to become a plaque.
Fill with 1 tablespoon, whatever filling we like, chocolate pieces, tight jam or portion and close the filling in a special shape.
Gather and pinch the components to close the filling in the dough.
With the dough compounds underneath, touch the doughnuts on baking paper on the sheet.
We touch the doughnuts a few times because they're inflatable.
We gently push their surface to expand.
Cover the doughnuts and let them stand for 20 minutes in a warm place to rest.

dry-brine-turkey.name: Dry Brine Turkey
instructions: Pat turkey dry with paper towels. Season inside and outside of turkey with kosher salt, focusing on breast and thighs. Place turkey, breast-side up, in the roasting pan and cover with plastic wrap. Refrigerate turkey for about 2 days.
Flip turkey breast-side down, cover with plastic wrap, and refrigerate for about 1 more day.

Remove plastic wrap and place turkey on a rack over a baking sheet the night before you plan to roast. Allow turkey to air-dry in the refrigerator for at least 8 hours. This step helps the skin crisp beautifully during roasting.
Bring turkey to room temperature, 1 to 2 hours; pat dry with paper towels. Season turkey with black pepper and place onion and celery in the cavity.
Preheat oven to 218°C (220 degrees C). Place turkey, breast-side down, in a roasting pan.

Roast in the preheated oven until skin is golden, about 30 minutes. Remove turkey from oven and flip to breast-side up. Reduce oven temperature to 163°C (165 degrees C); continue roasting until an instant-read thermometer inserted into the thickest part of the thigh reads 74°C (74 degrees C), about 2 hours.
Transfer turkey to a large platter and loosely tent with aluminum foil; allow turkey to rest about 30 minutes before carving.
